title: Foxbook transparency-log leaf taxonomy (v1)
description:
The set of event shapes written to tl_leaves.leaf_data. V0 ships a single shape — `agent-key-registration` — enumerated so reviewers can see what ships today and what is explicitly deferred. Explicit deferrals (must not land silently before their target day):
  - `claim-event` (shape TBD) → Day 5, pairs with the claim flow state machine.
  - `key-rotation` + `revocation` → Day 6–7, pairs with the recovery-key harness per foundation §6.6.
  - `manifest-version-diff` → week 2+, after manifests_versions has callers.
  - Firehose `hire.settled`/`hire.failed`/`delegation.announced` events are NOT leaves — they live in firehose_events and reference leaves by inclusion proof.
All leaf shapes $ref shared primitives in x-foxbook.v1.json (did, ed25519PublicKeyHex, recoveryKeyFingerprint) rather than redefining them — prevents the "two definitions of did" drift bug.
